subject: feat(content): add markdown formatting toolbar to freeform text editor
body:
Non-technical users shouldn't need to memorize markdown syntax. Adds a
compact toolbar above the textarea with buttons for: bold, italic,
strikethrough, headings (H1/H2), quote, bullet list, numbered list,
divider, and link. Each button wraps selected text or inserts a
placeholder at the cursor.

Tags: ui, markdown, freeform, text, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: freeform-text
Semver: minor
